title: Structural acoustics
body: Structural acoustics is the study of the mechanical waves in structures and how they interact with and radiate into adjacent media.  The field of structural acoustics is often referred to as vibroacoustics in Europe and Asia.  People that work in the field of structural acoustics are known as structural acousticians.  The field of structural acoustics can be closely related to a number of other fields of acoustics including noise, transduction, underwater acoustics, and physical acoustics.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from September 2013
